title: erythraea centaurium
intro: Erythraea centaurium, also known as Centaury, is a perennial herbaceous plant belonging to the Gentianaceae family. Traditionally, Centaury has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including its bitter and anti-inflammatory compounds, which can help alleviate digestive issues and reduce swelling. The health benefits of Centaury include its potential to soothe the digestive system, reduce stress and anxiety, and support the immune system. Centaury can be prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
